categories.name: Duck-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by duck.

categories.name: MEV Protection
categories.content: MEV (Maximal Extractable Value) protection is a set of rules and mechanisms designed to prevent or mitigate the negative impacts of MEV in decentralized finance (DeFi) environments.

categories.name: Commodities Meme
categories.content: Meme projects tied to commodities in traditional finance.

categories.name: OpenServ Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens launched on OpenServ, a multi-chain crowdfunding platform designed for autonomous startups and Agentic Applications (aApps) built on OpenServ’s AI reasoning infrastructure.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: SideChain
categories.content: A sidechain is a separate blockchain that runs parallel to a main blockchain. It allows transactions and applications to operate independently to enhance scalability and functionality.

categories.name: Bridged-Tokens
categories.content: Bridged-tokens refers to a token that has been transferred or "bridged" from one blockchain to another, typically through the use of a blockchain bridge.

categories.name: Stock market-themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to the stock market.

categories.name: InfoFi
categories.content: InfoFi combines blockchain and AI to monetise and trade attention, influence, and data as assets. It uses decentralised platforms to aggregate, verify, and distribute information, enabling users to be rewarded from their engagement or content.

categories.name: topblast.lol Ecosystem
categories.content: topblast.lol is a launchpad on The Open Network (TON), integrating fair-launch mechanics with a comprehensive Telegram-native DeFi ecosystem.

categories.name: Hybrid Token Standards
categories.content: Hybrid Token Standards allow tokens to have characteristics of both fungible assets and non-fungible tokens.

categories.name: Leveraged Token
categories.content: Leveraged crypto token is a type of financial instrument hat allows traders to amplify their exposure to the price movements of an underlying cryptocurrency.

categories.name: JPY Stablecoin
categories.content: A JPY stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Japanese yen.

categories.name: Quantum-Resistant
categories.content: Quantum-resistant projects are characterised by their use of post-quantum cryptographic algorithms (e.g., hash-based, lattice-based) to remain secure against potential attacks from future quantum computers.

categories.name: Murad Picks
categories.content: Tokens promoted by a memecoin KOL @MustStopMurad.

categories.name: Zero Knowledge (ZK)
categories.content:
Zero-knowledge proof or Zero-knowledge protocol is a method by which one party (the prover) can prove to another party (the verifier) that a given statement is true while the prover avoids conveying any additional information apart from the fact that the statement is indeed true.

This category tracks cryptocurrency that utilises Zero Knowledge implementation to execute transactions, which may include smart contract execution, value transfer, and others.

categories.name: bStocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized representations of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs issued by BTech Holdings Limited, a Binance Group affiliate structured as a Special Purpose Vehicle in the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

categories.name: Mobile Mining
categories.content: Mobile mining allows users to use a smartphone or mobile device to mine cryptocurrencies.
